name: ARIMA (Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average)
applicable_scenarios: short-horizon forecasting of a single stationary (or differenceable) series
modeling autocorrelation through AR, MA, and differencing terms
typical_cases: river flow or demand forecasting without strong seasonality
common_pitfalls: assumes (differenced) series is stationary; check with ADF / KPSS
seasonal data needs SARIMA (seasonal order) to avoid systematic error
model selection via AIC can overfit in small samples
